# fcs_harbor_artifact (Resource)

Registers an existing container or VM disk artifact from the tenant's Harbor project and pins it to an immutable digest. Destroy removes only the FCS registration; it never deletes Harbor manifests or layers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kind` (String) Artifact use: container or vm_disk.
- `reference` (String) Existing OCI tag or sha256 digest. Tags are resolved and pinned during create.
- `repository` (String) Repository path relative to the server-derived tenant project.

### Read-Only

- `canonical_reference` (String) Digest-pinned registry/project/repository@sha256 reference.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `digest` (String) Immutable sha256 digest resolved by the API.
- `id` (String) FCS registry resource ID (UUID).
- `media_type` (String) OCI manifest media type reported by Harbor.
- `project` (String) Tenant Harbor project derived by the API.
- `registry` (String) Registry hostname.
- `size_bytes` (Number) Artifact size reported by Harbor, in bytes.
- `status` (String) FCS registration lifecycle status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last verification timestamp.
